description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants, paired with casual sneakers. The figure has a rounded face and a short, layered hairstyle that frames the head. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear to be comfortable for walking. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for everyday urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or residential streets.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright with arms outstretched, wearing a short-sleeve shirt, straight pants, and sneakers, with a short, layered hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full front of the shirt and pants, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the shirt and pants, and the outline of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the shirt and pants, and the outline of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
